# mcp-studio

"Mission Control for the MCP Zoo" — web dashboard (FastAPI) + MCP server (FastMCP 3.x) for managing MCP servers across the fleet. Beta (v0.2.1-beta).

> Full reference: [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)

## Key Tools
- **MCP server discovery** — find running MCP servers on the network
- **Server management** — start, stop, configure MCP servers via dashboard
- **Client management** — manage IDE/desktop client configurations
- **Repo management** — browse and clone MCP repos
- **Working sets** — grouped collections of MCP servers for different workflows
- **Smoke testing** — test server endpoints from the dashboard
- **Prometheus metrics** — `/metrics` endpoint for observability

## Ports
| Port | Service |
|------|---------|
| 10724 | Backend (FastAPI + MCP) |
| 10725 | Frontend (CORS origin) |

## Quick Start
```bash
uv sync && uvicorn mcp_studio.main:app --port 10724
```
